title: Nature's Compass Immersive
description: Allows you to locate biomes anywhere in the world—a more immersive version of the original Nature's Compass.
body:
![Header image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f890d007d041feb236d05175d913e6e62d4ce720.png)

Nature's Compass is an item that allows you to search for a biome's location anywhere in the world. Nature's Compass Immersive is a modified version of Chaosyr's [original mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass): Instead of choosing the biome in a GUI, you now have to use a cartography table to calibrate the compass.

## Features

- Right-clicking a cartography table with the Nature's Compass opens the Biome Table, allowing you to calibrate the compass to a biome of your choice.
- When the compass is not pointing at a biome, it will point at the world spawn
- Supports all registered biomes, overworld and other dimensions, both vanilla and modded
## Gallery

![Choosing a biome in the cartography table.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d1168341a4db55f567909862f146112c0d89c09_0.webp)

_Choosing a biome in the cartography table._

![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d25445c542d536b419fcc64ccb9e04e7f31f6030.png)

_The crafting recipe._

## Modpacks
Yes, you can use this mod in your modpack.

## Credits
Based on Chaosyr's original [Nature's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass). Check it out!
